Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heartlander]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Andel Petronus is a Heartlander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur and Vorus Belfry are Heartlanders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Heartlanders compete for status with the Erinin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — A half-Heartlander man is imprisoned in a cell filled with books.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Heartlander is a type of skin color found among dignified citizens in the Aurelian Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Heartlanders can have pure black skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — A dark-skinned Heartlander grabbed Shera by the throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Heartlanders rule the Heartland.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — A Heartlander man was sitting on the Emperor's bed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Heartlanders are people from the Heartlands.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — A Heartlander man is seated opposite Calder in the mansion.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Heartlanders are natives with dark skin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
